name: the probes_consumed count is surfaced through both the translate and recommend markers
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v11.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>tt.err; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-recommend.sh" --requirements req.json --profile v11.json --out opt.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>rr.err; grep -qE 'probes_consumed=[1-9]' tt.err && grep -qE 'probes_consumed=[1-9]' rr.err && echo probes-consumed-surfaced 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json

bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline" --answers p.json --probe-answer owasp:owasp_threat_posture=adversarial --probe-answer slsa:slsa_build_level=l3 --probe-answer react:react_accessibility_target=wcag-aa --probe-answer aws:aws_region_strategy=multi-region --probe-answer k8s:k8s_multitenancy=multi-tenant --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
